---
title: "Figure 4"
author: "Siyuan Huang"
date: "2025-12-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message = F, warning = F, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

set.seed(42)
```

## Load libraries
```{r load-libraries-1, message = F, warning = F}
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(showtext)
```

## Font and theme settings
```{r font-and-theme-settings-1, message = F, warning = F}
showtext_auto()
showtext_opts(dpi = 600)

# Register the Arial font if present (its path varies by OS); otherwise fall
# back to the default sans-serif family so figures render on any machine.
arial_path <- c(
  "C:/Windows/Fonts/arial.ttf",                        # Windows
  "/Library/Fonts/Arial.ttf",                          # macOS
  "/usr/share/fonts/truetype/msttcorefonts/Arial.ttf"  # Linux (msttcorefonts)
)
arial_path <- arial_path[file.exists(arial_path)][1]

if (!is.na(arial_path)) {
  font_add(family = "Arial", regular = arial_path)
  theme_set(theme_classic(base_family = "Arial"))
} else {
  theme_set(theme_classic())
}
```

## Import data
```{r import-data-1, message = F, warning = F}
df <- read_excel("data/Study_1_Subjective_Data.xlsx")
```

## Data processing and summary statistics
```{r data-processing-and-summary-statistics-1, message = F, warning = F}
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    Mean_Quality = (Statistical_Accuracy + Clarity_and_Structure +
      Conceptual_Depth + Pedagogical_Effectiveness) / 4,
    Model_Name = case_when(
      Model == "ChatGPT_4o" ~ "GPT-4o",
      Model == "ChatGPT_o1" ~ "OpenAI o1",
      Model == "Grok3" ~ "Grok 3",
      Model == "Gemini_2.0" ~ "Gemini 2.0 Flash"
    )
  )

summary_data <- df %>%
  group_by(Model_Name, Profession) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(Mean_Quality),
    sd = sd(Mean_Quality),
    n = n(),
    se = sd / sqrt(n),
    ci_lower = mean - 1.96 * se,
    ci_upper = mean + 1.96 * se,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Model_Name = factor(
      Model_Name,
      levels = c("GPT-4o", "OpenAI o1", "Grok 3", "Gemini 2.0 Flash")
    ),
    Profession = factor(Profession, levels = c("Instructor", "Student"))
  )
```

## Color settings
```{r color-settings-1, message = F, warning = F}
profession_colors <- c("Instructor" = "#D55E00", "Student" = "#0072B2")
errorbar_colors <- c("Instructor" = "#E8A77A", "Student" = "#7AB8D9")
```

## Plot and save figure
```{r plot-and-save-figure-1, message = F, warning = F}
p <- ggplot(
  summary_data,
  aes(x = Model_Name, y = mean, color = Profession, shape = Profession)
) +
  geom_errorbar(
    aes(ymin = ci_lower, ymax = ci_upper),
    width = 0,
    linewidth = 0.5,
    alpha = 1,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3),
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    size = 4.5,
    stroke = 1,
    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = profession_colors, name = NULL) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("Instructor" = 15, "Student" = 16), name = NULL) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(4.4, 6.0),
    breaks = c(4.4, 4.8, 5.2, 5.6, 6.0),
    expand = c(0, 0)
  ) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 1, xend = 2, y = 4.4, yend = 4.4), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 2, xend = 3, y = 4.4, yend = 4.4), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_segment(aes(x = 3, xend = 4, y = 4.4, yend = 4.4), color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Mean guidance quality"
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(4.4, 6.0), clip = "off") +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 14, hjust = 0),
    axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(t = 10)),
    axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, margin = margin(r = 10)),
    axis.text.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(t = 7)),
    axis.text.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13, color = "black", margin = margin(r = 7)),
    legend.text = element_text(face = "plain", size = 13),
    legend.position = c(0.95, 1),
    legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
    axis.ticks.length = unit(8, "points"),
    axis.ticks = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    axis.line = element_line(colour = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major = element_blank()
  )

print(p)

ggsave("figure/Figure_Study1_2.pdf", p, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study1_2.png", p, width = 7, height = 5, dpi = 600, bg = "white")
ggsave("figure/Figure_Study1_2.svg", p, width = 7, height = 5, bg = "white")
```

## Reproducibility

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
